title: Responsive Flexbox Gallery
summary: Build a responsive card gallery using Flexbox.
studentInstructions: Each card includes title, image, and short description.
Make the layout adapt to narrow screens.

rubric.description: At least six cards exist with title, image, and description.
Uses Flexbox properly for layout and spacing.
Layout adapts cleanly to smaller widths.
Cards share consistent spacing and style.
HTML and CSS are logically organized.

gradingInstructions: Use only this assignment and its rubric.
Check required files before grading quality.
Write output only to the assigned ai_output directory.
